requirement: Memory allocation must support requests up to 48GB

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation for requests below 48GB
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation for 32GB should be successful
Memory allocation for 48GB should be successful

test_cases.description: Validate memory allocation for requests above 48GB
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation for 64GB should fail with appropriate message

test_cases.description: Evaluate performance of memory allocation for various sizes
steps: Request memory allocation for different sizes (e.g., 1GB, 8GB, 16GB, 32GB, 48GB)
Measure allocation time for each size
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation time should be within acceptable limits for all sizes

test_cases.description: Verify memory allocation functionality in integration with GPU driver
preconditions: GPU driver is installed and functioning
steps: Check GPU driver logs for any errors
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation should integrate seamlessly with GPU driver without errors
